claim: Pure-PyTorch sparse-state global patch core at the current 20M scale boundary. It improves LayerCake quality versus dense 20M variants but does not yet beat the matched BPE transformer.
diagnosis: Structured sparse-state mixing improves the LayerCake 20M BPB frontier from 2.0256 to 2.0214, but pure-PyTorch gathered attention is not training-efficient enough and still trails BPE quality by 0.0060 BPB.
